✅ Conformance findings — fixed

closes the #2193 grader's first 5 findings · branch fix/conformance-findings · 2026-06-04

5
Findings (before)
0
Findings (after)
100%
Detect→fix loop closed
The CC-idiom conformance grader (#2193, shipped in #2207) flagged 5 real stale idioms on its first run. This PR fixes all 5 — re-running conformance-check.mjs now reports ✓ No stale-idiom drift. The tool found drift, a human fixed it, the tool confirms clean: the loop the whole session was building toward.

The 5 fixes (authoritative values)

FileBeforeAfter
assess / implement / verify SKILL.mdclaude-opus-4-6claude-opus-4-8
doctor/.../hook-validation.md66 hooks · 15 events · 12 bundles144 · 27 · 11
validate-counts/.../count-locations.md103 skills · 36 agents · 173 hooks111 · 37 · 144

Counts sourced from hooks.json (144 global hooks · 27 event keys · 11 split bundles) and CLAUDE.md (111 skills · 37 agents).

Regenerated the 4 affected reference mdx (docs drift gate); non-gated lib/generated churn reverted to keep the PR focused. PR playground gate artifact.
